creator: pat@patmaddox.com
text:
Created attachment 255694
update to 17.12.5

Updated and tested on my please repo.

There is one functional change: I removed the please_sandbox binary, which only runs on linux, because I was unable to build it.

It later occurred to me that it _might_ run on Linuxulator. I can give a bit more time to seeing if it builds.

Given that v15.17.0 is nearly 4 years old, I figured this patch might be worthwhile even without the sandbox.
